cases.question: Which product categories drove the most revenue last month?
cases.executed_sql: SELECT p.category AS category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS orders FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') AND DATE_TRUNC(DATE(oi.created_at), MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH) GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
cases.answer: Outerwear & Coats led with 1330431.52 in revenue across 1234 orders.

cases.question: Who are our top customers by spend?
cases.executed_sql: SELECT o.user_id AS customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total_spend FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned') GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Which products sell well but have high return risk?
cases.executed_sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, p.category AS category, COUNT(*) AS items_sold, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS gross_sales, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*)), 3) AS return_rate FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` AS p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY product_name, category HAVING items_sold >= 20 ORDER BY return_rate DESC, gross_sales DESC LIMIT 15
cases.answer: Trail Jacket generated 4000 in gross sales with a 20% return rate across 50 items.

cases.question: Which one lost more revenue to returns within that same cohort?
history: Compare California and New York revenue for order items created last quarter.
cases.executed_sql: SELECT u.state AS region, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'Returned' THEN oi.sale_price ELSE 0 END), 2) AS lost_revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` AS o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE u.state IN ('California', 'New York') AND DATE(oi.created_at) >= DATE_SUB(DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), QUARTER), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER) AND DATE(oi.created_at) < DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), QUARTER) GROUP BY region ORDER BY lost_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
cases.answer: New York lost 300 to returns versus 200 for California.
